notes.connections:
Keithley 0 (Power Supply)
    CH1 "3.3V" -> EVB P300 Pin 2 (3.3 V rail)
    CH2 "1.8V" -> EVB P300 Pin 4 (1.8 V rail)
    Return/GND -> EVB P300 Pins 1 and 3
Hittite 0 REF_CLK (Signal Generator) -> J104 REF CLK input
FieldFox 0 DAC_OUT (Spectrum Analyzer) <-J108 DAC output path after balun/filter
USB -> EVB USB port for SPI control (factory PC-control mode)
notes.sources:
UG-based defaults:
- Supplies: P300 requires 3.3 V and 1.8 V rails plus ground
- REF CLK: Apply external clock at J104; default example uses 100 MHz
- Internal PLL optional; PFD max is 125 MHz when PLL is enabled
- SYNC_CLK should run (about SYSCLK/24) as a quick validity check
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 -> monitor 3.3 V and 1.8 V currents during run
FieldFox 0 DAC_OUT -> monitor single-tone/sweep output spectrum
If SYNC_CLK is absent, check power rails and REF CLK validity
notes.general:
Config: AD9914
Based on AD9914/AD9915 EVB User Guide.
Recommended bring-up flow:
1) Apply 3.3 V and 1.8 V rails
2) Apply REF CLK to J104
3) Open GUI
4) Plug in USB prom PC
5) Load AD9914 Setup file in GUI
6) Press Load
PLL lock issues on BRD 2
